gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps forward, spreads arms wide while looking at the screen, and smiles at the colorful blocks.
a person tilts their head slightly and gestures with a hand toward the groups, encouraging learners to count along.
a tutor bends slightly at the knees, stretches arms forward and outward, forming a rectangle to represent the 3 by 4 array.
a person raises one hand and moves it in a sweeping motion, counting fingers as if illustrating rows and columns.
a tutor takes a step back, claps hands together excitedly, and invites the learners to join in counting the new array.
a person leans forward, holds up two fingers, and motions with the other hand as if counting blocks in the groups.
a tutor raises both arms in a celebratory gesture and nods enthusiastically while praising the learners for their hard work.
a person steps forward, places hands on hips confidently, and gestures outward as if sharing the power of multiplication.
